comment.body:
No, 
If you are an importer and buy goods from let say China. 
As soon as you import that good, you (the importer) have to pay the tariff to the US. 
So, you as an importer will loose money and in the end you will probably forward that extra cost to the end-customer. 
So, US will get some money from the tariffs, but it will be the end-customer who really pay the increased price.
comment.raw_body:
